overview: Rejuvime Medical provides bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, GLP-1 weight-loss medication, peptide therapies, aesthetic treatments, and sexual wellness programs under the direction of board-certified plastic surgeon Dr. Jonathan Weiler. New patients follow a 3-step process: initial lab work and consultation, personalized treatment planning, and ongoing care through monthly membership tiers.
highlights: Multiple locations across Louisiana and Mississippi
In-house lab draws at all locations
Tiered membership model bundling services and supplies
targetAudience: Men and women seeking hormone optimization, weight loss management, and wellness support through evidence-based medical treatments.
